title.prompt: Click or press any key to start

settings.title: Settings
settings.darkModeDesc: Dark surfaces for the modal stack

error.title: Something went wrong
error.desc: The game engine encountered an unexpected error. You can try reloading the page; if the problem persists, please report it.

welcome.title: Welcome to Sketchbook!
welcome.body1: Feel free to explore the world and interact with available vehicles. There are also various scenarios ready to launch from the right panel.
welcome.body2: Have fun with all the new features that have recently been added!

empty.title: Hello world!
empty.body: Empty Sketchbook world was successfully initialized. Enjoy the blueness of the sky.

webgl.title: WebGL compatibility
webgl.body: This browser doesn't seem to have the required WebGL 2 capabilities. The application may not work correctly.

planet.heading: Which planet do you want to go to?

greet.text: Hi there! Ben and I take turns walking this loop - it's a good way to keep an eye on the spawn area.
greet.c1: Why are you walking in circles?

tour.text: Cars are parked behind you, the helipad is over the hill, the boats sit at the dock east of here, and the rocketship lives on the island.
tour.c0: Why are you walking in circles?

why.text: I'm a path-following NPC. There are four invisible nodes around this area and I just walk between them. Ben does the same in reverse.

greet.text: Hey. If you bumped into Anna she'll have told you about the loop - same deal here, just the other way around.

races.text: Oval and Figure-8 are car races. The Tunnel is faster but the curves bite. Boat Race uses the marina - get in a boat and drive over the start.

rocket.text: It launches you to the moon. Get in, press Space to start the countdown, and a planet picker shows up at apogee. Lunar gravity is real - be careful when you walk around up there.

greet.text: Welcome to Sketchbook! Press Esc anytime if you need a pause menu - Resume, Settings, Restart, Reload.
greet.c0: How do I drive a car?

cars.text: Walk up to a vehicle, press F to enter, then WASD to drive. Press F again to leave. Same goes for boats, helis and the rocket - Shift makes air vehicles boost.

controls.text: WASD moves you, Space jumps, Shift sprints. Z toggles the on-screen control hint. Shift+C is the free camera; T teleports you there.
controls.c0: How do I drive a car?

greet.text: You can tune the cars from the Vehicles folder in the right-hand debug panel - friction, suspension, engine force. Changes apply to anything you spawn next.

tuning.text: Friction Slip, Suspension Stiffness, Max Suspension, Damping Compression, Damping Relaxation, and Engine Force. Crank Engine Force up if you want to launch off the ramps.

world.text: Time scale, sun position, day/night cycle, gravity scale (0–2x), free-cam speed. Plus a Reset button if you mess everything up.
